profileMenu.successMessage: You have been logged out successfully.
profileMenu.SESSION_DESTROY_FAILED: Unable to log out. Please try again.
profileMenu.UNAUTHENTICATED: You do not have the required permission. Please log in.

register.heading: Create an Account
register.userNameDescription: Choose a unique username. Letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
register.passwordDescription: Must be at least 8 characters long.
register.successAlertDescription: Your account has been created successfully. A confirmation email has been sent to your inbox. You can now log in after confirming your email.
register.USERNAME_TAKEN: Failed to register user. Please check your information and try again.
register.EMAIL_TAKEN: An account with this email already exists.

verify.heading: Account verification
verify.description: We are verifying your account. Please wait a moment.
verify.successMessage: Your email has been verified successfully!
verify.TOKEN_IS_NOT_ASSOCIATED: Verification failed. The link is invalid.
verify.TOKEN_HAS_EXPIRED: Verification failed. The link has expired. Please request a new one.

login.heading: Welcome back
login.description: Enter your credentials to access your account
login.loginDescription: Enter your username or email address
login.LOGIN_ERROR: Failed to log in. Please check your credentials.
login.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login.UNAUTHENTICATED: You do not have the required permission. Please log in.
login.ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATED: Your account has been deactivated. Please contact support if you believe this is a mistake.

resetPassword.heading: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Enter your email address and we’ll send you a link to reset your password.
resetPassword.emailDescription: Enter the email address associated with your account.
resetPassword.successAlertDescription: A password reset link has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox.
resetPassword.RESET_PASSWORD_ERROR: Unable to send the reset link at this time. Please try again later.
resetPassword.resetPassword: Unable to send the reset link at this time. Please try again later.

newPassword.heading: Set a new password
newPassword.description: Choose a new password to secure your account.
newPassword.passwordDescription: Use at least 8 characters. A mix of letters and numbers is recommended for better security.
newPassword.passwordRepeatDescription: Enter the same password again to confirm.
newPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset successfully.
newPassword.NEW_PASSWORD_ERROR: Unable to reset your password. Please try again or request a new reset link.
newPassword.INVALID_TOKEN: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

deactivate.heading: Deactivate Account
deactivate.pinDescription: Enter your security PIN to confirm deactivation.
deactivate.emailDescription: Enter your email to confirm your identity.
deactivate.passwordDescription: Enter your password to confirm account deactivation.
deactivate.successMessage: Your account has been successfully deactivated.
deactivate.DEACTIVATE_ACCOUNT_ERROR: Failed to deactivate your account. Please check your credentials and try again.
deactivate.VERIFICATION_REQUIRED: For security reasons, please enter the verification code we sent to you.
deactivate.ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATED: Your account has been successfully deactivated.
deactivate.INVALID_EMAIL: The email address you entered is incorrect.
deactivate.INVALID_PASSWORD: The password you entered is incorrect.
deactivate.TOKEN_NOT_FOUND: The verification code is invalid or has already been used.
deactivate.TOKEN_EXPIRED: The verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
deactivate.verificationCodeSent: A verification code has been sent to your email.
deactivate.UNAUTHENTICATED: You do not have the required permission. Please log in.

header.heading: Profile Settings
header.description: Manage your personal information and profile preferences.

avatar.heading: Profile Avatar

presetAvatar.heading: Choose a preset avatar
presetAvatar.description: Pick one of the preset avatars. You can change it anytime.

confirmModal.heading: Are you sure?
confirmModal.message: Do you want to remove your current avatar?

avatar.info: Upload a clear image. Supported formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF. Max size: 10 MB

success.successUpdateMessage: Your avatar has been successfully updated.
success.successRemoveMessage: Your avatar has been successfully removed.

errors.errorUpdateMessage: Failed to update the avatar. Please try again.
errors.INVALID_AVATAR_REFERENCE: Failed to remove the avatar. Please try again.
errors.FILE_ERROR: Please select an image to upload.
errors.AVATAR_UPLOAD_FAILED: Failed to upload avatar. Please try again.
errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong. Please try again.

info.heading: Edit Profile
info.usernameDescription: Your unique username used across the platform.
info.displayNameDescription: This name will be shown publicly on your profile.
info.bioDescription: A short description that appears on your profile.
info.successMessage: Your profile has been updated successfully.
info.USERNAME_TAKEN: This username is already taken. Please choose another one.
info.UNKNOWN: An error occurred while updating your profile.

createForm.heading: Social Links
createForm.titleDescription: Enter the name of the platform you want to add.
createForm.urlDescription: Paste the full link to your profile.
createForm.errorMessage: Failed to add social link. Please try again.

editForm.errorUpdateMessage: Failed to update social link. Please try again.
editForm.errorRemoveMessage: Failed to remove social link. Please try again.

socialLinks.successReorderMessage: Your social links have been reordered.
socialLinks.errorReorderMessage: Could not reorder social links. Please try again.

header.heading: Account Settings
header.description: Manage your account information and preferences.
header.securityDescription: Update your password, enable two-factor authentication, and protect your account.
header.deactivationDescription: Temporarily disable your account and hide your profile.

email.heading: Change Email
email.passwordDescription: For security reasons, please enter your password to confirm this change.
email.successMessage: Your email has been updated successfully.
email.EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE: This email address is already in use. Please choose a different one.
email.AUTH_USER_NOT_FOUND: Authenticated user not found. Please sign in again.
email.SAME_EMAIL: The new email address is the same as your current one.
email.INCORRECT_PASSWORD: The password you entered is incorrect.

password.heading: Change Password
password.successMessage: Your password has been updated successfully.
password.PASSWORD_SAME_AS_OLD: New password cannot be the same as old password.

twoFactor.heading: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account.

enable.heading: Enable Two-Factor Authentication
enable.qrInstruction: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app.
enable.pinDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
enable.successMessage: Two-factor authentication has been enabled successfully.

disabled.heading: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
disabled.message: Are you sure you want to disable two-factor authentication?
disabled.successMessage: Two-factor authentication has been disabled successfully.

deactivation.heading: Deactivate Account
deactivation.description: You can temporarily deactivate your account. Your profile will be hidden until you reactivate it.

confirmModal.heading: Confirm Deactivation
confirmModal.message: Are you sure you want to deactivate your account? You will be able to restore it within the next 7 days. After this period, your account will be permanently deleted.

header.heading: Account Sessions
header.description: Manage your active sessions across all devices and locations.

confirmModal.heading: Confirm Logout
confirmModal.message: Are you sure you want to end this session? This action will completely delete the session, and all activities on this device will be terminated.

sessionItem.successMessage: The session has been successfully terminated.
sessionItem.errorMessage: An error occurred while logging out. Please try again.

header.heading: Following
header.description: List of users you are subscribed to

following.empty: You are not following anyone yet.
following.USER_NOT_FOUND: The user could not be found.
following.UNAUTHENTICATED: You do not have the required permission. Please log in.

unfollowing.USER_NOT_FOUND: The user could not be found.
unfollowing.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.

header.heading: Subscription Plans
header.description: Manage and customize your channel's subscription plans

subscription.empty: You are not subscribed to any subscription.

plans.description: Pick the plan that fits you best
plans.infoMessage: Select a plan that fits your needs. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

confirmModal.heading: Change subscription plan
confirmModal.unusedProducts: You still have {remaining} unused products on your current plan. If you continue, they will be lost.

plans.PLAN_NOT_FOUND: The selected plan could not be found.

header.heading: Transactions
header.description: View the list of your recent transactions.

header.heading: Create Product
header.description: Fill in the basic information about your product, including title, price, and category. This information will be visible to potential buyers.

step1.heading: Create a New Product Listing

title.label: Title
title.description: Short and clear title of your product

price.label: Price
price.description: Set a fair price for your product

description.label: Description
description.description: Provide detailed information about the product

step1.CATEGORY_NOT_LEAF: Product can be added only to leaf categories.

header.heading: Upload Images
header.description: Add up to 10 images to make your product more attractive and improve visibility.

step2.heading: Upload Product Images
step2.info: You can upload up to 10 images (JPG, PNG, WEBP). Maximum file size is 10 MB per image.
step2.reorderInfo: You can drag and drop images to change their order. The first image will be the main one.
step2.FILE_ERROR: Please select valid image files to upload
step2.IMAGE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You can upload up to 10 images
step2.INVALID_FILE_TYPE: Only JPG, PNG, WEBP images are allowed
step2.UNKNOWN: An error occurred while uploading images

errors.minFiles: Please select at least one image
errors.maxFiles: You can upload up to 10 images
errors.invalidFileType: Only JPG, PNG, WEBP images are allowed

step3.heading: Review and publish your product

title.label: Title
title.description: Provide a clear and concise title that describes your product.

price.label: Price
price.description: Set a fair and competitive price for your product.

description.label: Description
description.description: Add detailed information to help buyers understand your product.

category.label: Category
category.description: Select the most appropriate category for your product.

status.label: Status
status.description: Choose the visibility and availability of your product.

step3.deletedProduct: This product was deleted and cannot be edited.
step3.reorderInfo: You can drag and drop images to change their order. The first image will be the main one.
step3.INVALID_PRICE: Invalid price. Please enter a valid amount.

deleteProduct.NOT_ALLOWED: You are not allowed to delete these images.
deleteProduct.IMAGES_NOT_FOUND: The selected images were not found.

updateImagesPosition.NOT_ALLOWED: You are not allowed to reorder these images.

review.REVIEW_ERROR: You must provide at least a rating or a comment.

userProduct.description: Browse all products listed by this user

deleteProduct.confirmModal: Are you sure you want to delete this product?

editMessage.introduction: Enter to save • Esc to cancel
